themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The phrase 'let us bring again the ark of our God to us' reveals a crucial theological insigh...".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 3 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: The phrase 'let us bring again the ark of our God to us' reveals a crucial theological insigh...

themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "וַיִּירָ֤א: was afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 12 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: וַיִּירָ֤א: was afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God.
